verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Though man may strive to go beyond the reef of space, To crawl beyond the distant glimmering star, This world's a room so small within my Master's house the open sky, but a portion of his yard

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How Big is God How big and wide His vast domain To try to tell, these lips can only start. He's big enough to rule His mighty universe yet small enough to live within my heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As winter's chill may cause the tiny seed to fall To lie asleep till waked by summer's rain The heart grown cold will warm and throb with life anew The Master's touch will bring the glow again
